title: 政府海外文宣 (澳洲, 韓國, 德國)

replies.msg:
Dear Friends of Hong Kong:

You may have seen in the papers today that the Government has started to place advertisements in selected major international newspapers. (some attached for reference)

After months of blanket, non-stop media coverage on Hong Kong, and following the Chief Executive’s announcement of her “four actions” on Wednesday, it is the right time for the Government to provide international audiences with a sincere and unvarnished assessment of our position.

We want to stress to international audiences our ongoing commitment to "One Country, Two Systems"; total rejection of violence as a means to solve problems; and our genuine desire for a constructive and respectful dialogue to air and discuss all the grievances that have surfaced and which we need to address to get Hong Kong back on track.

The first advertisement appeared in the Australian Financial Review on Sept 5; three more today (Sept 6) in the Financial Times, Washington Post and Frankfurter Allgemeine Zeitung.

Others will run in selected major overseas newspapers in North America, Europe and Asia next week.
